problem: At the end of a game, each of the five members of a basketball team shake hands with each of the five members of the other team, and all of the players shake hands with the two referees. How many handshakes occur?

classified_questions.question: What is the scenario described in the problem?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How many members are there in each basketball team?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How many members are there in total, including both teams?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many handshakes occur between the members of one team and the members of the other team?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Why can we simply count the number of handshakes between the members of one team to determine all the handshakes?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How many handshakes occur when each member of a team shakes hands with each member of the other team?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many handshakes occur between the players and the referees?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many handshakes occur in total?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you explain the calculations used to determine the number of handshakes between the team members?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you explain the calculations used to determine the number of handshakes between the players and the referees?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you explain how the total number of handshakes is calculated?
classified_questions.label: b
